user.title: Power Insight
user.description:
Give this energy mix a name and choose which calculations to enable. Use the **Add device** button after setup to add your grid connection and devices.

**Visit: https://github.com/Hoffmann77/ha-power-insight for additional information**

data_description.name: A name for this energy mix configuration.
data_description.calculate_instantaneous_rates: Select which instantaneous rate sensors to create, e.g. cost rate (per hour) or CO₂ intensity rate.
data_description.calculate_instantaneous_saving_rates: Select which instantaneous saving rate sensors to create, e.g. cost savings rate (per hour). Requires a price or CO₂ entity on the grid adapter depending on your selection.
data_description.calculate_accumulated_entities: Select which accumulated total sensors to create, e.g. cost savings or export compensation.

error.invalid_name: The name cannot be empty or invalid.

init.title: Options
init.description:
Choose a section to configure which sensors to create. Each device type shows only the options it supports, and your choices are saved when you submit a section.
Changes apply automatically — the integration reloads itself, so no Home Assistant restart is needed. Disabled sensors are hidden but keep their history and reappear when re-enabled.

combined.title: Whole-home sensors
combined.description: Sensors that aggregate your whole energy mix.

data_description.distribution_power: Watt power-split sensors (import/export, self-consumption, charging, standby).
data_description.cost_rates: Operating cost rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.cost_savings_rates: Self-consumption cost savings rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.distribution_ratios: Percentage of a device's own power that is exported, self-consumed, charging or standby.

grid.title: Grid sensors
grid.description: Import/export power, cost and export compensation at your grid connection.

data_description.distribution_power: Watt power-split sensors (import/export, self-consumption, charging, standby).
data_description.cost_rates: Operating cost rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.export_compensation: Compensation for energy fed to the grid: the rate and/or its running total.
data_description.distribution_ratios: Percentage of a device's own power that is exported, self-consumed, charging or standby.
data_description.distribution_shares: A device's share of the combined export / self-consumption.

pv_system.title: PV system sensors
pv_system.description: Applies to all PV system devices.

data_description.distribution_power: Watt power-split sensors (import/export, self-consumption, charging, standby).
data_description.cost_rates: Operating cost rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.cost_savings_rates: Self-consumption cost savings rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.export_compensation: Compensation for energy fed to the grid: the rate and/or its running total.
data_description.distribution_ratios: Percentage of a device's own power that is exported, self-consumed, charging or standby.
data_description.distribution_shares: A device's share of the combined export / self-consumption.

data_description.distribution_power: Watt power-split sensors (import/export, self-consumption, charging, standby).
data_description.cost_rates: Operating cost rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.cost_savings_rates: Self-consumption cost savings rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.export_compensation: Compensation for energy fed to the grid: the rate and/or its running total.
data_description.distribution_ratios: Percentage of a device's own power that is exported, self-consumed, charging or standby.
data_description.distribution_shares: A device's share of the combined export / self-consumption.
data_description.charging_source_shares: For each selected charge source, its share of the battery's charging.

data_description.cost_rates: Operating cost rate, and optionally its levelized variant.
data_description.power_source_shares: The share of this consumer's power coming from each source.

data_description.debug_power_entities: Expose power values used by the internal calculations as additional sensors. Useful for troubleshooting.

confirm.title: Some devices need configuring
confirm.description: Your selection needs data that one or more devices have not provided yet. Submit to save anyway, then reconfigure those devices.

error.reconfigure_adapters_first: These devices are missing data required by your selection: {adapters_needing_reconfigure}. Save to apply anyway, then reconfigure them.

user.title: Add Device
user.description: Choose the type of adapter you want to add to your energy system.

configure.title: Configure {adapter_type}
configure.description: Configure your {adapter_type}. Fields marked as required depend on which calculations are enabled in the integration options.

data_description.name: A unique name for this device.
data_description.power_entity: Sensor reporting power in W, kW, or MW. For the grid: positive = import, negative = export.
data_description.power_entity_inverted: Enable if your sensor reports the power direction inverted.
data_description.grid_electricity_price_entity: Sensor or input number providing the current electricity price per kWh (in your Home Assistant currency). Required when cost calculations are enabled.
data_description.co2_intensity_entity: Sensor providing the current grid CO₂ intensity in g/kWh. Required when CO₂ calculations are enabled.
data_description.exports_power: Enable if this device can export excess power to the grid.
data_description.export_compensation: Rate received per kWh exported to the grid (in your configured currency per kWh). Required when cost savings calculation is enabled.
data_description.battery_efficiency: The round-trip efficiency of the battery in percent.
data_description.charge_from_adapters: Select which adapters (grid and/or PV systems) this battery is allowed to charge from.
data_description.lifetime_production: Total expected energy production over the device lifetime (kWh). Required when levelized calculation is enabled.
data_description.lifetime_cost: Total investment and installation cost over the device lifetime (in your configured currency). Required when levelized cost calculation is enabled.
data_description.co2_footprint: Total CO₂ emissions from manufacturing and installation (kg). Required when levelized CO₂ calculation is enabled.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {adapter_type}
reconfigure.description: Update this adapter. Editing the lifetime cost or production values applies a correction factor that retroactively rescales this device's displayed levelized values.

data_description.power_entity: Sensor reporting power in W, kW, or MW.
data_description.power_entity_inverted: Enable if your sensor reports the power direction inverted.
data_description.grid_electricity_price_entity: Sensor or input number providing the current electricity price per kWh (in your Home Assistant currency). Required when cost calculations are enabled.
data_description.co2_intensity_entity: Sensor providing the current grid CO₂ intensity in g/kWh. Required when CO₂ calculations are enabled.
data_description.charge_from_adapters: Select which adapters (grid and/or PV systems) this battery is allowed to charge from.
data_description.lifetime_production: Total expected energy production over the device lifetime (kWh). Updating this rescales the displayed levelized values.
data_description.lifetime_cost: Total investment and installation cost over the device lifetime (in your configured currency). Updating this rescales the displayed levelized values.

error.invalid_name: The name cannot be empty or invalid.
error.name_not_unique: A device with this name already exists. Please choose a unique name.
error.invalid_power_entity: The selected entity does not exist or does not report power (W, kW, MW).
error.invalid_price_entity: The selected entity does not exist or is unavailable.
error.invalid_co2_entity: The selected entity does not exist or is unavailable.
error.required: This field is required with the current calculation settings.

abort.grid_already_configured: A grid adapter is already configured for this integration. Only one grid adapter is supported.

no_grid_configured.title: No grid configured for {entry_title}
no_grid_configured.description: The Power Insight integration **{entry_title}** could not load because no grid adapter has been configured. Open the integration and use the **Add device** button to add a Grid adapter.

reconfigure_battery_adapters.title: Battery {battery_name} needs reconfiguration
reconfigure_battery_adapters.description: An adapter was added or removed. Please reconfigure **{battery_name}** to ensure the correct charge sources are applied. Open the integration, find the device, and use the **Reconfigure** option.
